Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts shows that seafood may be great on its own, but when bringing different kinds together - it makes for some great eating.
Video.title: Mixed

Video.summary: Tyrone reveals Iafa's DNA test results and helps her explore her heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet Iafa Almeida Cac

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts brings bacon butter, brown butter, maple butter and chimichurri butter to this fishy party.
Video.title: Butter

Video.summary: Seafood lover Chef Spencer Watts soaks sablefish in a root beer and fennel marinade and serves it with creamy, grilled bok choy; Spencer dresses sablefish in a mole sauce that has a hint of maple and chocolate; lobster has its sweet side.
Video.title: Sweet

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts makes salmon and prawns pop with flavor as he works with any seafood kitchen's must-have ingredient: flavored oils.
Video.title: Oil

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts adds bread and pastry to Canadian cod and squid.
Video.title: Breaded

Video.summary: Spencer Watts shows how to enjoy fish served cold with arctic char pate & tequila shrimp ceviche.
Video.title: Cold

Video.summary: Seafood loving chef Spencer Watts brings the party with mojito marinated mahi mahi, cosmo crab hush puppies and coconut, rum and pineapple king crab.
Video.title: Cocktails

Video.summary: Chef and seafood expert Spencer Watts showcases the perfect pairing of vinegar and fish with balsamic marinated walleye, gastrique lobster and crawfish popcorn.
Video.title: Vinegar

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts gets saucy with seafood, making a mascarpone sauce and crab sauce for salmon and orange aioli and clarified butter for crab.
Video.title: Saucy

Video.summary: Spencer mixes the sweet flavors of fruit and fish as he makes dishes with salmon and scallops.
Video.title: Fruit

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts creates some dairy infused dishes using red snapper and scampi.
Video.title: Dairy

Video.summary: Chef Spencer Watts cooks up fast faves using scallops and trout, all done in under 30 minutes.
Video.title: Fast Favs

Video.summary: Vanessa Gianfrancesco, Italian chef extraordinaire, demonstrates how to prepare bread in delicious ways before cooking the perfect juicy steak, with a side of Tuscan beans, and finishing it all with a light tiramisu.
Video.title: Italian Breads

Video.summary: Noodles are the star ingredients when chef Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen cooks up somen noodles with dipping sauce, ramen salad, a fried noodle dish, and a one-pot delight.
Video.title: Popular Japanese Noodles

Video.summary: Vanessa makes dishes centered around olive oil including two different pasta dishes.
Video.title: It's All About the Olive Oil

Image.alt: It's All About the Olive Oil
It's All About the Olive Oil
It's All About the Olive Oil
It's All About the Olive Oil
It's All About the Olive Oil

Video.summary: Thai chef Pailin Chongchitnant explores the cuisine of Northern Thai city Chiang Mai with red chili pork dip, minced pork salad, Thai-style chicken noodle soup, and Burmese-style curry.
Video.title: Northern Cuisine: Chiang Mai

Video.summary: Michael prepares classics like margherita pizza and fried seafood.
Video.title: Campania

Video.summary: Michael makes some Apulian classics.
Video.title: Puglia

Video.summary: Jessica prepares some treats using autumn-inspired ingredients.
Video.title: Fall

Video.summary: Jessica travels around the world with diverse desserts.
Video.title: Around the World

Video.summary: Jessica bakes desserts inspired by the colors and flavors of spring.
Video.title: Spring

Video.summary: Jessica shows off some of her favourite picnic-approved desserts.
Video.title: Picnic

Video.summary: Jessica bakes some DIY recipes that will spice up any wedding.
Video.title: DIY Wedding

Video.summary: Jessica whips up some sweet treats for a summer pool party or just being outdoors.
Video.title: Summer

Video.summary: Jessica uses some surprising ingredients to prepare three desserts.
Video.title: Surprise Ingredients

Video.summary: Jessica shares how to make breakfast treats like banana bread and hand pies filled with grape jelly.
Video.title: Saturday Morning Breakfast

Video.summary: Vanessa Gianfrancesco prepares her favorite Chinese-inspired brunch dishes; shrimp dumplings; pork bao buns combine roast pork, delicious hoisin, fluffy steamed buns, and crunchy fresh veggies; homemade congee topped with crispy beef and scallions.
Video.title: Dim Sum Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa shares her favourite Vegan Brunch recipes.
Video.title: Vegan Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa shares mid-morning bread recipes.
Video.title: Bread for Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa creates a delicious seafood brunch menu.
Video.title: Seafood Brunch

Video.summary: Vanessa creates an international menu with brunch recipes from around the world.
Video.title: Brunch Around the World

Video.summary: Vanessa creates a brunch menu inspired by the Middle East.
Video.title: Middle Eastern Brunch

Video.summary: Jasmin Ibrahim and Shahir Massoud bring their favorite spices to everyone's favorite comfort food recipes.
Video.title: Comfort + Spice

Video.summary: A soy, miso and honey sauce to accompany a seared turkey breast; a black demi-glace to accompany a beef tenderloin and a duxelles sauce.
Video.title: Savoury

Video.summary: A burnt butter piccata sauce to accompany a chicken piccata; a smoky tomato ponzu sauce to accompany fried oysters.
Video.title: Sour

Video.summary: A Provençal tomato sauce to accompany halibut; a rustic pepperonata with skirt steak; a trio of pesto sauces.
Video.title: Vegetable

Video.summary: A wine-based pasta sauce with gorgonzola, prosciutto and orange; a grape and olive tapenade to accompany a partridge brandade.
Video.title: Salty & Funky

Video.summary: A large sundae with a classic chocolate sauce; a caramelized onion soubise to accompany pork chops.
Video.title: Sweet

Video.summary: Chef Kyle Crawford starts with bitter sauces; a combination of chimichurris: one with black garlic; a thick stout and espresso sauce; a traditional Georgian walnut sauce.
Video.title: Bitter
